steps.title: Substitute $3x=30$ into the target expression
steps.content: The expression $3x-12$ contains $3x$, and the given equation states $3x=30$, so replace $3x$ with $30$ to get $30-12$.

steps.title: Compute the target value
steps.content: So $3x-12 = 30-12 = 18$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
